detaileddescription.para: See File List for API documentation sorted by public header files.

sect1.title: About
sect1.para: libxml2 is an XML toolkit implemented in C, originally developed for the GNOME Project.
Official releases can be downloaded from https://download.gnome.org/sources/libxml2/
The git repository is hosted on GNOME's GitLab server: https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/libxml2

sect1.title: License
sect1.para: This code is released under the MIT License, see the Copyright file.
